evt-001.summary: Coordinated robocall campaign spoofing local bank numbers. Transcript analysis indicates pressure tactics to obtain SMS 2FA codes.

evidenceItems.snippet: ...this is the fraud department. We noticed unauthorized charges on your account. Please read the code we just sent you to verify your identity...
Caller ID spoofed. True origin traced to VOIP block known for prior scam campaigns.

evt-001.recommendedAction: Issue carrier-level block on identified VOIP block and alert local precinct.

evt-002.summary: Mobile scan by retail merchant detected high-quality counterfeit $100 bill. Matches signature of known local printer ring.

evidenceItems.snippet: Microprinting on collar absent. Security thread does not fluoresce under simulated UV.
4th report within 2 miles in the last 48 hours.

evt-002.recommendedAction: Dispatch local unit to collect physical evidence. Alert nearby merchants.
